---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path (long panel: one row per group-period)
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_macro_panel.csv")

  # Variables
  facet_var: "district"      # one small panel per level of this column
  x_var: "year"              # horizontal axis (usually time)
  y_var: "literacy_rate"     # value to plot

  # "fixed" = same y-axis on every panel (honest comparison, recommended);
  # "free"  = each panel scales to its own range.
  scale_mode: "fixed"

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Literacy Rate (%)"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Group Comparison: Small Multiples"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  x_label: ""
  y_label: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 5.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])

# ==============================================================================
# DATA SCRUBBING & PROCESSING BLOCK
# ==============================================================================
plot_data <- raw_data %>%
  drop_na(all_of(c(params$facet_var, params$x_var, params$y_var))) %>%
  mutate(
    Facet = as.character(.data[[params$facet_var]]),
    X = cerp_numeric(.data[[params$x_var]], params$x_var),
    Y = cerp_numeric(.data[[params$y_var]], params$y_var)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(X, Y) %>%
  arrange(Facet, X)

# Faint "all groups" context layer drawn behind every panel: same data with the
# facet column dropped so it is replicated across all facets.
ghost <- plot_data %>% transmute(X, Y, gid = Facet)

n_facets <- n_distinct(plot_data$Facet)
n_col <- ceiling(sqrt(n_facets))
facet_scales <- if (identical(params$scale_mode, "free")) "free_y" else "fixed"
```


```{r plot-small-multiples, fig.height=max(4, 2.4 * ceiling(n_facets / n_col))}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = X, y = Y)) +

  # Context: every group's trend, faint, in each panel
  geom_line(data = ghost, aes(group = gid), color = cerp_cols[["neutral"]],
            alpha = 0.35, linewidth = 0.5) +

  # Foreground: this panel's own series, highlighted
  geom_line(color = cerp_cols[["primary"]], linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = cerp_cols[["primary"]], size = 1.6) +

  facet_wrap(~ Facet, scales = facet_scales, ncol = n_col) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 4)) +

  theme_cerp() +

  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.9, "lines")
  ) +

  labs(
    title = if (nzchar(params$chart_title)) params$chart_title else paste("Group Comparison:", params$metric_name),
    subtitle = if (nzchar(params$chart_subtitle)) params$chart_subtitle else paste0(
      "One panel per ", params$facet_var,
      "; the highlighted line is that group, faint lines are all groups for context."),
    x = if (nzchar(params$x_label)) params$x_label else str_to_title(params$x_var),
    y = if (nzchar(params$y_label)) params$y_label else params$metric_name,
    caption = params$source_note
  )
```
